titleStmt.title: SII 19.199: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 199. (A.R. No. 173 of 1907.) TIRUPPALATTUṞAI, TIRUCHIRAPALLI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, ĀDIMŪLĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records that the Śivadharmis (priests) of the temple of Mahādēva-Bhaṭāra at Tirupāṟṟuṟai in Uttamaśīli-chaturvēdimaṅgalam on the southern bank of the river to burn a lamp in the temple with the interest on 8 kaḻañju of gold received by them from Aiyaṉ Amudaṉ a Veḷḷāḷa resident of Murukkūr a hamlet of the village. Uttamaśīli is known to have been a son of Parāntaka I. The inscription may be assigned to Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu teṉ(ka)
karai brahmadeyam śrīuttamaciliccaturvvetimaṅka
lattu tiruppāṟṟuṟai śivadhanmi kāśyapan centaṉ murttiyum pā
ttuṟaiyaṉ veli kaṉṟiyum Empimārum Ikkuṭi(n) nārāyaṇaṉ comatattanum
nārāyaṇa ṉamutaṉum Empimārum Ivaṉaivom Ivūr paṭākai murukkūr Irukkum
veḷḷāṉ Aiyyaṉamutaṉ tiruppāṟṟuṟai m(ā)hādevabhaṣṭārakarkku cantrādityaval Erippa
tāka vaitta viḷakku Arai Ivvarai viḷakkukkum vaitta poṉ 8� Ippoṉ Eṇkaḻañ
cum koṇṭu Erippomāṉom Ivvaṉaivom Ivarkaḷ colla Immarattiṭṭe
ḻutiṉeṉ pāṇṭināṭṭu pūṅkāṉṉaāṭṭuk kuḷattūruṭaiya māṇikkaṉ cantiracekaraṉeṉ
Itu paṉmmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 19.199 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
